details.safeProbe: Use the parity request against gid://shopify/Order/0 first so Shopify returns validation/userErrors without enqueuing a real tax-summary job.
details.mustRemainUnsupportedUntilModeled: This root can enqueue tax-summary work and depends on tax-service semantics, so it should stay explicit unsupported passthrough until fixture-backed queue/result behavior is known.

notes: Planned tax-summary parity for `taxSummaryCreate`. This root is not locally supported yet and should not be promoted to local staging until safe validation and happy-path enqueue semantics are captured.
